content.text:
I can help — but I need a bit more detail first.

I searched the mesh for "Nestle" and didn't find any existing nodes, so I don't have an existing price list to work from.

Which of these do you mean?
- Fetch existing Nestle pricing in the mesh (if you can point me to where it is)
- Create or update a Nestle price list / SKUs in the mesh (I would delegate to the Executor or MeshAgent)
- Research current market prices for Nestle products (I would delegate to Research)
- Produce an insurance/ risk-based price for Nestle assets (delegate to InsuranceAgent)

If you want creation or research, tell me:
- Scope (specific products or all Nestle SKUs)
- Region / currency
- Any target margins or pricing rules
- Deadline

Tell me which option and details, and I’ll proceed or delegate.
